meta.title: Marco — Web Developer & AI Automation in Ticino
meta.description: I help small businesses grow online with fast websites and AI automation systems. Based in Ticino, I work with clients across Switzerland.

hero.label: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer
hero.headline: Your modern website, ready in days — not months
hero.subheadline: I help small businesses and professionals grow online with fast websites and systems that automate repetitive work.
hero.description: I help small businesses and professionals grow online with fast websites and systems that automate repetitive work. Based in Ticino, I work with clients across Switzerland.

problems.label: Sound familiar?
problems.headline: Running a business is hard enough
problems.description: You shouldn't worry about your website or lose hours to repetitive tasks

website.title: Is your website driving customers away?
website.description: An outdated or poorly mobile-optimized website destroys trust in seconds. Customers expect professionalism — and they judge you by your website.

time.title: Spending hours on tasks that could do themselves?
time.description: Replying to the same emails, entering data manually, keeping appointments in your head. These activities consume time you could invest in growing your business.

tech.title: Does technology feel like an obstacle?
tech.description: Too many tools, too much complexity, no one to explain simply. You shouldn't need to be a tech expert to have tools that work.

services.label: What I do
services.headline: Two services. Concrete results.
services.description: Focused on what really makes a difference for small businesses

web.title: Websites that convert visitors into customers
web.description: I build fast, secure, and easy-to-manage websites. Every project is tailored to your business, not to impress other developers.
features: Responsive design: perfect on phone, tablet, and computer
Optimized speed: loading in under 3 seconds
Basic SEO: your customers find you on Google

automation.title: Let AI do the repetitive work
automation.description: I connect your tools and automate workflows. You save time, reduce errors, and focus on what really matters.
features: Tool integration: I connect your existing software
Automated workflows: emails, follow-ups, data management
AI assistants: automatic responses to customers 24/7
Automatic reports: important data at a glance

consulting.title: Tailored technology strategy
consulting.description: Analysis of your needs and concrete action plan to digitize your business.

techstack.title: Modern and reliable technologies
techstack.description: I only use proven technologies that guarantee performance, security, and scalability over time.

process.label: The process
process.headline: Simple. Fast. No surprises.
process.description: From first message to live product — here's how we work together

1.title: Discovery
1.description: A call to understand your project and objectives. No commitment. You tell me about your business, challenges, and what you want to achieve. I understand what you really need before proposing a tailored solution.

2.title: Build and develop
2.description: I keep you updated throughout the process. You receive regular previews and your feedback is integral to the work. No surprises at delivery.

3.title: Launch and support
3.description: The website goes live, everything works, you're happy. But it doesn't end there: I show you how to manage content and remain available for questions and small changes.

projects.label: My work
projects.headline: Recent projects
projects.description: Concrete examples of websites and automations built for clients

osteria.title: Osteria Bellavista — Demo Project
osteria.description: Demo project showcasing an elegant website for an Italian restaurant. Features online reservations, digital menu, and responsive design.

crm.title: CRM Automation
crm.description: Automation system for lead management and automatic follow-ups.

dashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
dashboard.description: Data visualization and automatic reports for small businesses.

about.headline: Hi, I'm Marco
paragraphs: I develop websites and automation systems for small businesses that want to grow online without complications. After years of experience in the digital industry, I've chosen to specialize in what I do best: creating digital tools that work, without unnecessary frills.

I believe in simplicity and transparency. I don't sell complicated solutions — I build tools that solve real problems. My approach is direct: I listen, understand, build. No jargon, no impossible promises. Just concrete results.

I'm based in Ticino and work primarily with clients in Italian Switzerland and across Switzerland. I speak Italian, German, and English — and I know how important it is to communicate in the client's language.

contact.headline: Ready to grow your business?
contact.description: Write to me and I'll respond within 24 hours. A brief conversation helps us understand if I can help you.

success.title: Thank you!
success.message: I've received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
